title: thymus serpyllum var. austriacus
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. austriacus, also known as creeping thyme or wild thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of T. serpyllum var. austriacus include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Thyme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
